name: rapp-static-mcp
note: A static MCP catalog (rapp-static-mcp/1.0). Each tool's implementation is a pinned /api compute-cell frame. A host resolves the tool, verifies the frame's sha8, and runs it in a sandbox — the same verify-before-exec the spec describes, applied to code. The one non-static piece is the generic transport shim (shim.mjs) that speaks MCP JSON-RPC; it carries zero per-tool logic.

tools.name: dataverse_search
tools.description: Search the live static Dataverse twin for accounts matching a query. Runs a content-addressed compute cell in a sandbox — no server.

q.description: Text to match against live rows.

tools.name: ping
tools.description: Echo a message back through the sandboxed compute cell — proves the verify-before-exec round trip end to end.
